# Spacing ladder

Consecutive single-line paragraphs separated by an increasing number of blank
lines. Each paragraph carries one sentinel. The Y deltas between successive
sentinels reveal the paragraph gap (B1) and confirm the body line height (T2),
and whether extra blank lines collapse or accumulate.

ZEBRA31 paragraph separated by one blank line above.

ZEBRA32 paragraph separated by one blank line above.


ZEBRA33 paragraph separated by two blank lines above.



ZEBRA34 paragraph separated by three blank lines above.




ZEBRA35 paragraph separated by four blank lines above.
